text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! A soaring, sweeping—absolute
victory!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Well, it's only natural. I'm the world's
strongest, after all!
choice_data_list: Let's do our best at the next race too!
Let's do our best at the next race too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Well, it's only natural. I'm the world's
strongest, after all!
choice_data_list: Let's do our best at the next race too!
Let's do our best at the next race too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm countin' on you for the training I need to stay
on top!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That said, my next victory is already a sure thing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know! That's just what my papa always says!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"The real fear comes after you win. That's when
there's a target on your back!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't get complacent with more strong enemies
ahead! Don't worry, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's keep on headin' toward the very top!
